meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS starter kit to Solve slow development speed (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome slow development speed. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: SaaS starter kit to Solve slow development speed
content.seo_description: Stop wasting weeks on boilerplate. Learn how to use a SaaS starter kit with Antigravity and Claude Code to ship client projects at record speed.
content.answer_block: Stop building from scratch. By leveraging a battle-tested SaaS starter kit, you eliminate repetitive setup tasks like authentication, database schema, and payment integration. Combined with Antigravity for architecture and Claude Code for automated implementation, you can reduce your time-to-market by 80%, allowing you to focus purely on high-value client features.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, your client is waiting, and you are stuck in the 'boilerplate purgatory' of configuring Next.js routers, database migrations, and Stripe webhooks for the tenth time this year. Every hour spent on scaffolding is an hour you aren't shipping value, eroding your margins and delaying the revenue your project deserves.

But the era of manual configuration is over. The most elite freelancers have stopped writing boilerplate and started engineering solutions. By adopting an automated SaaS starter kit workflow, you transform your development process from a grueling manual labor exercise into a high-velocity, machine-assisted production line.

steps.title: Architect the Foundation
steps.description: Define your SaaS structure using Antigravity to generate a clean, production-ready codebase that adheres to industry standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a production-ready Next.js SaaS starter scaffold with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Supabase authentication, and Stripe checkout integration. Ensure the architecture follows clean code principles and modular routing.

steps.title: Configure Database Schema
steps.description: Automate your database migrations and type definitions to ensure data integrity without writing manual SQL scripts.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Prisma schema for a multi-tenant SaaS application including User, Organization, Subscription, and Project tables with proper foreign key relationships.
steps.claude_code_command: claude code 'generate prisma schema and run migrations'

steps.title: Implement Auth Middleware
steps.description: Secure your application routes by injecting professional-grade authentication logic provided by your starter kit.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement Next.js middleware for protected routes, ensuring only authenticated users can access the dashboard while redirecting unauthenticated users to the landing page.

steps.title: Integrate Payment Infrastructure
steps.description: Hook up Stripe to your application to handle subscriptions and webhooks, ensuring your client gets paid from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Stripe webhook handler to sync subscription status with the database and implement a checkout session API route.
steps.claude_code_command: claude code 'implement stripe checkout and webhook logic'

steps.title: Automate Feature Deployment
steps.description: Finalize your CI/CD pipeline so every push to your repository triggers an automated test and deployment sequence.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a GitHub Actions workflow for building, testing, and deploying this SaaS starter to Vercel.
steps.claude_code_command: claude code 'setup github actions deployment workflow'

pro_tips: Always use Environment Variables for API keys; never hardcode secrets, even in private repos.
Prioritize 'feature flagging' early so you can deploy finished code without exposing incomplete UI components.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your auth logic before you start building the core application UI.
Keep your starter kit updated by pulling upstream changes weekly; don't let your boilerplate drift from the ecosystem standard.
Automate your documentation generation by using AI to parse your codebase and create a README for your clients.
content.next_steps: Once your boilerplate is live, begin by building the 'Golden Path'—the single most important user journey that leads to client revenue. Use Claude Code to iterate on this path rapidly before expanding to secondary features.
content.conversion_block: You now have the exact blueprint to stop trading time for manual labor and start shipping SaaS products like a lead architect. Stop letting slow development speed dictate your career growth. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
